summary: Iteration 48 — Biblioteca de Modelos & Classificação Técnica. Backend 22/22 pytest cases PASS. Frontend e2e: BibliotecaPage renders with 3 tabs (Categorias/Fabricantes/Modelos Mestres), search/add work, full create-categoria flow works end-to-end (toast 'Criado!' shown, item appears in list), Ativo form exposes new classification dropdowns (Categoria, Fabricante, Classe, Criticidade, Família). Deep-copy endpoint produces independent planos_inspecao with full traceability (modelo_origem_id, modelo_versao=1, plano_origem_id) and updates the ativo with modelo_mestre_id/categoria_id/fabricante_id/modelo_id. RBAC: tecnico correctly blocked (403) on all create endpoints and can still read categorias.

pass_fail_matrix.POST /api/biblioteca/modelos-mestre/{id}: PASS (2 planos copied with new ids, new pergunta ids)

issues: Recharts containers emit width(-1)/height(-1) warnings repeatedly — chart parent has no min-width/min-height. Non-blocking but pollutes console and may cause empty charts on first render. Add minWidth=0 / minHeight=0 or fixed aspect ratio on the ResponsiveContainer parent.

action_items: (Optional) Add a GET /api/biblioteca/categorias/{id} and /fabricantes/{id} for read-by-id parity with /modelos-mestre/{id}. Current code only exposes list + soft delete + update, which forces UI to round-trip via list+search.
(Optional) Fix Recharts container width/height warnings on the dashboard parent (minWidth: 0).
critical_code_review_comments: biblioteca.py:55,118,187 — list endpoints use `.to_list(limit)` instead of `.to_list(length=limit)` (kw arg). Pymongo/Motor accepts positional but mixing limit() and to_list(limit) is brittle; recommend `.to_list(length=None)` after limit() or `.to_list(length=limit)` for clarity.
biblioteca.py:298 — `motivo` is a query parameter (FastAPI default), works but POST bodies are conventional for action data. Confirmed working with `?motivo=...`.

biblioteca.py:355-358 — aplicar endpoint overwrites `categoria_id` / `fabricante_id` / `modelo_id` on the ativo with the master model's values. If the ativo already had a different (manually set) classification, it is silently replaced. Consider logging the previous values in audit_log for true traceability (the audit currently only logs the apply action).

biblioteca.py:209,320 — `next_code('PLA','planos')` generates plano codes here, but the legacy /planos-inspecao create endpoint in server.py may have its own numbering. Verify no code collisions between master-plan codes and asset-plan codes (same counter ‘planos_seq’ used → safe).
biblioteca.py:243 — `especificacoes: data.get('especificacoes', {})` is a free-form dict (no validation). OK for v1 but flag for future schema typing.

biblioteca.py:283 (delete_modelo_mestre) — only soft-deletes the modelo_mestre; does NOT cascade or warn about already-applied (deep-copied) plans on ativos that reference it via modelo_origem_id. By design (deep copy = independent), but this could surprise users. UI should show 'X ativos derivam deste modelo' before allowing delete.

Frontend App.js single file is >8000 lines (BibliotecaPage at 7213, routes at 8010). Strongly recommend splitting into pages/ and components/ folders for maintainability — already flagged in earlier iterations.
Recharts ResponsiveContainer parent missing minWidth/minHeight → repeated console warnings. Cosmetic.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (biblioteca render, create-categoria, ativo classification fields, regression nav)

test_credentials: master@manutrix.com / master123, tecnico@manutrix.com / tecnico123 — both authenticated successfully. force_password_change was NOT triggered on master.
seed_data_creation: Created and then soft-deleted: 1 TEST_CAT_*, 1 TEST_FAB_*, 1 TEST_MM_* with 2 planos. Also UI created UI_TEST_CAT_* (not cleaned, harmless residue, soft-delete via API works). Deep-copy applied 2 planos_inspecao to the first existing ativo — these remain on the asset (TEST data with modelo_origem_id can be filtered by main agent if needed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 fully covers Biblioteca + Deep Copy + Traceability + RBAC. Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration48_biblioteca.py runs in ~4s, all 22 pass. The previous iteration 47 RCA (server.py:1180-1182 duplicate $or in inspection auto-load) was NOT retested here — it is OUTSIDE the scope of iteration 48 and remains a known issue per iteration_47.json. Frontend BibliotecaPage is fully functional with all required testids. Ativo classification dropdowns load from /api/biblioteca/categorias and /api/biblioteca/fabricantes (verified visually).
rca of the issue: n/a — no new bugs detected in this iteration.
